steps.title: Use the colon's clue
steps.content: The statement after the colon explains the blank: "we will never be able to answer it." The missing word must mean impossible to settle or answer.

steps.title: Rule out weaker meanings
steps.content: B would mean internally contradictory, C would mean urgently necessary, and D would mean impossible to avoid. Those do not match a question that cannot be answered. The answer is A.
